gui.credit.notice.unsupported: Editing not supported for this category
gui.credit.notice.sample: Showing existing recipe as sample (edit any slot to start a draft)
gui.credit.settings.persistence.label: Edit save persistence
gui.credit.settings.persistence.min.name: Minimum
gui.credit.settings.persistence.min.desc: Edits are discarded when the editor closes
gui.credit.settings.persistence.normal.d: Edits persist until the game exits (default)
gui.credit.settings.persistence.max.name: Maximum
gui.credit.settings.persistence.max.desc: Edits saved to config/credit-drafts.dat and restored on game restart
gui.credit.settings.crafting_share.label: Share Shaped/Shapeless edits
gui.credit.settings.crafting_share.desc: When ON, switching Shaped/Shapeless keeps the same grid contents
gui.credit.settings.undo.label: Track edits (Ctrl+Z)
gui.credit.settings.undo.desc: Disable to skip undo snapshot capture (perf saving)
gui.credit.settings.delete_data.label: Delete edit data (Shift+Click)
gui.credit.settings.delete_data.done: [CraftPattern] Edit data and persistence file deleted
gui.credit.settings.reset.label: Reset settings (Shift+Click)
gui.credit.tagbar.cfg.empty_hint: Drop an item/fluid/gas here to configure its behavior
gui.credit.tagbar.finder.hint: Click to reopen list / Shift+right-click to clear
gui.credit.heat.hint: Click to cycle / Shift+click for none
gui.credit.keep_held.hint: Click to toggle / Shift+click for OFF
gui.credit.unsupported.click_close: Click again or click elsewhere to close
gui.credit.unsupported.viewer: View-only page (info or diagram). Not a recipe, can't be edited
gui.credit.unsupported.no_kubejs: Recipe type that doesn't accept KubeJS. No way to add recipes via KubeJS for this type
gui.credit.unsupported.vanilla_routed: This is just a vanilla recipe shown via a mod machine. Edit it in the vanilla recipe category
gui.credit.unsupported.dynamic: Recipes are generated dynamically by rule, so KubeJS can't intervene
gui.credit.unsupported.internal: Internal type — not meant to be authored directly by the player
gui.credit.unsupported.complex: Structure too complex; UI editor not implemented yet
gui.credit.unsupported.deferred: Extended format (9x9 / chained recipe etc.); deferred for future support
command.credit.craftpattern.desc: Open the CraftPattern recipe builder UI
command.credit.craftpattern_probe.desc: Dump full recipe data for a category to file (diagnostic)
command.credit.help.hover_click: Click to insert into chat. Hover for description.
